title: cissus corniculata
intro: Cissus corniculata, also known as the vine grape or woodruff vine, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cissus corniculata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving bone health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, although its effectiveness and safety as a dietary supplement have not been extensively scientifically studied.
